name: The Glowing Cavern
description: A vast natural cavern opens before you, its ceiling lost in darkness above. Clusters of phosphorescent mushrooms cast an eerie blue-green glow across dripping stalactites and pools of still water. The air is thick with spores and the earthy scent of decay.

setting_data.atmosphere: Bioluminescent fungi pulse with a slow rhythm like breathing, casting shifting shadows across the cavern walls. Drops of water echo in the silence, and strange rustlings come from the fungal clusters.

npcs.name: Sporeling Scout
npcs.description: A small humanoid figure composed entirely of interwoven mushroom caps and mycelium threads. It watches with glowing spore-eyes.
npcs.backstory: One of many sporelings that tend the cavern, this one serves as a watcher for the fungal colony that has grown here over centuries.

objects.label: Glowing Mushroom Cluster
objects.description: A dense cluster of blue-green phosphorescent mushrooms, some as tall as a halfling, pulsing gently.

objects.label: Still Underground Pool
objects.description: A shallow pool of crystal-clear water fed by dripping stalactites. Something glints at its bottom.

objects.label: Ancient Stalagmite
objects.description: A towering mineral formation covered in moss and fungal growth, thousands of years in the making.

objects.label: Mycelium Bridge
objects.description: A thick mat of hardened mycelium stretching across a narrow crevasse, surprisingly sturdy.

objects.label: Spore Vent
objects.description: A cluster of puffball mushrooms surrounding a crack in the floor that periodically releases clouds of spores.
